name: llm-brain
description: Filesystem-first durable memory and knowledge workflow specification for LLM agents.

interface.longDescription: LLM-Brain provides a filesystem-first memory workflow for agents across repositories, with OKF semantic memory, append-only episodes, review queues, provenance, indexes, context packs, and adapter guidance.
defaultPrompt: Use LLM-Brain to create a project memory with claims and reviews.
Use LLM-Brain to bootstrap a new topic brain for this repo.
Use LLM-Brain to generate a project pack for this task.
